short_description_of_the_course.label: Short Description of the Course

requirements_of_entry.label: Requirements of Entry
value: Networks and Operating Systems Essentials 2 (or equivalent)
This course is only available to Honours students.

co_requisites.label: Co-requisites
co_requisites.value:
Systems Programming (H) (required) 
Networked Systems (H) (recommended and optional)

timetable_and_length_and_frequency_of_te.label: Timetable and length and frequency of teaching sessions
timetable_and_length_and_frequency_of_te.value: Two one-hour lectures and one one-hour tutorial/lab session per week.

course_aims.label: Course Aims

intended_learning_outcomes_of_course.label: Intended Learning Outcomes of Course

description_of_summative_assessment.label: Description of Summative Assessment
description_of_summative_assessment.value: Examination (60%); Practical Exercises (20%) involving intensive C programming; thorough evaluation of understanding of principles and techniques via assessed questions (15%); presentation of studied materials, assessed on content , delivery and response to questions (5%)
